zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Von Württemberg I於1160年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特時，他的父親Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II24歲，母親Willibirg von Kirchberg21歲。他於1185年8月2日與Agathe Countess Of Veringen在德國爾特波格結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年8月19日在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特武特圖可海姆享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Von Württemberg I于1160年出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特时，他的父亲Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II24岁，母亲Willibirg von Kirchberg21岁。他于1185年8月2日与Agathe Countess Of Veringen在德国爾特波格结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年8月19日在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特武特圖可海姆享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Von Württemberg I was born in 1160, in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, was 24 and his mother, Willibirg von Kirchberg, was 21. He married Agathe Countess Of Veringen on 2 August 1185, in Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 August 1240, in Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Von Württemberg I est né en 1160, à Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Willibirg von Kirchberg, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agathe Countess Of Veringen le 2 août 1185, à Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 août 1240, à Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Von Württemberg I 1160 in Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II 24 und seine Mutter Willibirg von Kirchberg 21. Er hat am 2. August 1185 in Württemberg, Deutschland Agathe Countess Of Veringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. August 1240 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Von Württemberg I è nato il nel 1160 nel Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Willibirg von Kirchberg, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agathe Countess Of Veringen il 2 agosto 1185, nel Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1240, nel Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Von Württemberg Iが1160年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートで生まれた時，父Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG IIは24歳，母Willibirg von Kirchbergは21歳であった。1185年8月2日にドイツウuルッテンバーグでAgathe Countess Of Veringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年8月19日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートウンテルトuルクヘイムで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Von Württemberg I(이)가 1160년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Willibirg von Kirchberg(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1185년 8월 2일 독일 wu르테버그에서 Agathe Countess Of Veringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 8월 19일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트 운터트u르케임에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Von Württemberg I nasceu em 1160, em Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Willibirg von Kirchberg, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agathe Countess Of Veringen em 2 de agosto de 1185, em Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1240, em Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 80 anos.

ru.Grüningen, Biberach, Baden-Wuerttemberg,: грuнинген, риедлинген, крис бибирэич, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.Wurttemberger Hof, Schwabisch Hall, Bade: вuрттембиржир хоф, меинардт, ландкрис щвaбищ холл, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Von Württemberg I родился в 1160 г. в местности обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Willibirg von Kirchberg, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agathe Countess Of Veringen 2 августа 1185 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 августа 1240 г. в местности унтиртuрхим, стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Von Württemberg I nació en 1160, en Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Willibirg von Kirchberg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agathe Countess Of Veringen el 2 de agosto de 1185, en Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1240, en Untertürkheim, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 80 años.
